mapper.select: SELECT b.board_id, b.user_id, b.category, b.title, b.content, b.views, b.is_pinned, b.created_at, b.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment bc WHERE bc.board_id = b.board_id AND bc.deleted_at IS NULL) AS comment_count FROM board b JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.category = #{category} ORDER BY b.is_pinned DESC, b.created_at DESC

SELECT b.board_id, b.user_id, b.category, b.title, b.content, b.views, b.is_pinned, b.created_at, b.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment bc WHERE bc.board_id = b.board_id AND bc.deleted_at IS NULL) AS comment_count FROM board b JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE b.board_id = #{boardId} AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (user_id, category, title, content, is_pinned) VALUES (#{userId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isPinned})
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT b.board_id, b.user_id, b.category, b.title, b.content, b.views, b.is_pinned, b.created_at, u.name AS user_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment bc WHERE bc.board_id = b.board_id AND bc.deleted_at IS NULL) AS comment_count FROM board b JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.category = #{category} AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY b.is_pinned DESC, b.created_at DESC

SELECT bc.comment_id, bc.board_id, bc.user_id, bc.content, bc.created_at, bc.updated_at, u.name AS user_name FROM board_comment bc JOIN users u ON bc.user_id = u.user_id WHERE bc.board_id = #{boardId} AND bc.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY bc.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comment (board_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE board_comment SET content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
